name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: You need to read this
body:
Right now, we have an opportunity to change the system for the better, but we need your help.
#
Friends,
We all have a vision for what we want this country to become. We can make it a place that guarantees health care, education, and voting rights to all of its people. Our energy system can lead the world in clean, renewable energy production, and people can earn a living wage that does not force them to take on multiple jobs working themselves to the bone. The private prisons, restrictions on women's health care, and illegal behavior on Wall Street can be curtailed and undone, clearing a path for a more just and inclusive society for all.
This is not wishful thinking. It can be done, and so much more.
I got involved in this fight because like you, I saw that the conditions around me, which had persisted over generations of status quo politics, did not have to define the way we lived our lives. Right now, we have an opportunity to change the system for the better, but we need your help if we are going to bring about the radical change we so desperately need. [**Can you contribute $3 to Our Revolution? No matter the size of each individual donation, when we put our resources together we form the most powerful grassroots force this country has ever seen.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170724-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170724-full")
Whether you are fighting because you're buried in student loan debt, are struggling to afford your health care, or are one of the millions of Americans who have not bounced back from the Recession quite like Wall Street and the top one percent have, it is important that we stick together.
We have proven time and again that when we are determined, engaged, and supporting one another we can overcome whatever challenge is thrown our way. When the establishment told us that campaigning on Medicare for All, free college tuition, and closing the corporate tax loopholes without a Super PAC to help us was pie in the sky, we went out and won 22 states and over 13 million votes in the Democratic primary. That is exactly what we fought for.
We've also fought against some truly awful policies, from efforts to strip our health care and women's reproductive rights, to racist and xenophobic policies that would discriminate against Latino and Muslim immigrants from living in the land of the free. When things got tough, we stayed the course and prevailed.
Our Revolution is still working to advance the bold, progressive policies that brought us together by lobbying Democrats in the U.S. House to support the #PeoplesPlatform, but we need the resources to compete against the big money interests who are standing in our way. **[Can you chip in just $3 to help us continue the fight for a country that works for all?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170724-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170724-full")**
As long as a single person is denied their right to health care, an education, a living wage, or reproductive rights, we will be there fighting. Until the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street, and the prison-industrial complex are called to account for the harm they've done to the American people, we will stand with you in this fight.
We are not just in this movement for ourselves, we are in this movement for generations yet unborn. Thank you for being a part of the political revolution.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170724-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170724-full")**

name: The White House
subject: Obamacare Has Wreaked Havoc on Innocent Americans
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c692cee085f28627194af56697aa539c7368b7d5ea2b1559a8a469daf847fff0aaafc0237d9d94ebe1a3e628d36a67a6fd79

For seven years, Obamacare has wreaked havoc on the lives of innocent, hard-working Americans. The question for every Senator, Republican or Democrat, is whether they will side with Obamacare's architects or with its forgotten victims. The American people have waited long enough, and now is the time for action. We must repeal and replace Obamacare.

-------------

President Trump and Vice President Pence Meet with Obamacare Victims
Yesterday, President Trump and Vice President Pence welcomed American families who have been heavily burdened by Obamacare to the White House. At the event, President Trump made a statement urging the Senate to take action on healthcare reform.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c6920cd1c48b10122bc77f09c6edd058a9828b12217e235e0d45c1881c8cc3ad23cbea5531fa948a278d542abb6832c82c3b
Watch the President's Statement
President Trump speaks at Scout Jamboree in West Virginia
Yesterday evening, President Trump attended the 2017 Scout Jamboree in West Virginia and addressed the Boy Scouts of America. President Trump was joined by Secretaries Ryan Zinke, Rick Perry, and Tom Price.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c692b99a3948fe8691cdab988429c655ef4b674c56bcd43f5142041fbc9bf593d157f81f7a3fc3826aff094a1a775e0d10dc
Watch the Video

Salute to American Heroes
Tonight, President Trump will travel to Struthers, Ohio, to deliver remarks in honor of American Heroes week.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c69235d68fb6965dc0a98544c0077886a800d9bdf78be7bcbf9094735ed08ba5ca33d05c94fc32e161fef7728bd371f16470
Watch Live at 6pm ET
Photo of the Day

President Trump speaks at Scout Jamboree in West Virginia

| July 24, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Donald Trump will welcome the Prime Minister of Lebanon, Saad Hariri to the White House. Vice President Pence will participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch. Later this evening, the President and the First Lady will participate in a very special Salute to American Heroes in Struthers, Ohio.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c69235d68fb6965dc0a98544c0077886a800d9bdf78be7bcbf9094735ed08ba5ca33d05c94fc32e161fef7728bd371f16470
Watch Live at 6pm ET

Coming Up This Week

This week is American Heroes Week, dedicated to those who put their own lives on the line to protect American lives every day. Tomorrow, President Trump will participate in an American Legion event at the White House. On Thursday, President Trump will welcome the brave first responders from Alexandria, Virginia to the White House. The President will travel to New York on Friday to meet with NYPD members in Long Island.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c6925eb8cc102122ca60efe603ddce3e973839a021fead27790c5972116367bb7b29b0319e525e3e79b969e02bc9ad012e7c
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e75c2662f6f4c6927457fe247b21f03a395cddb465830f628db5ed0cb040566dbda5517a32cb374275183b692c4a03f835e1715ef9655572
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4e6817e506d7290197dc77790135699d184d18fbe660cde33c1e567b1b815ca7fe103e4f249d397c232e4db61b2a67fb5
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: this moment (add your name)
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Today, the Senate will vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw millions off their insurance. Add your name -- tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170725_tp_nd&source=em_20170725_tp_nd")**

Derek, I'll make this quick: Senate Republicans will vote today to repeal our health care.

What we do in this moment -- whether we keep raising our voices against repeal or back down -- could be the difference between this bill passing or failing.

**We can't let up now. Join the 224,702 Democrats who've already taken action and sign your name to let Republicans know that if they vote to take our health care away, we'll vote them out of office:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170725_tp_nd&source=em_20170725_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

body:
Looking for answers in your area. |
---
| | |

Peter,

We wanted to be sure you saw this message from the President.

---
| **[We're looking for 15 more active supporters to take our Listening to America Survey in 20112, and President Trump has asked for your input specifically.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb805eb2bd450f083d05f8e381ba65a591bfd962d109e4083ad4586111b7ca4712dc2f796e389d234e8526580cbefe9ccf018ef23feeb4e0)**
---

It's important that we hear from hard-working Americans across the nation to determine what is and isn't cutting through the noise of the **Fake News Media**.

---

subject: FWD: Become a founding member (support Democratic women)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec5/2a380d31/190e411e/fe43ec/1634114048/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec5/2a380d31/190e411e/fe43ec/1634114048/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Did you see this email from yesterday, everyone?
This community's support for electing Democratic women to the Senate has been outstanding, so we're raising the stakes.
Democratic women are on the front lines of the fight to protect affordable health care and secure funding for Planned Parenthood, so we're setting an ambitious goal -- let's sign up five hundred 2018 founding donors of the Women's Senate Network by midnight tonight.
[**Are you in? Good. Donate $3 or more now to own your part of the Women's Senate Network and elect more women like Senators Kamala Harris, Elizabeth Warren, and Jeanne Shaheen.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec5/2a380d31/190e411e/fe43ed/1634114048/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcyNV9XU04xa2lja19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20170725_WSN1kick_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We'll be upfront: 2018 will be hard for Democrats. But woman Senators are our best chance at perseverance -- that's why our early support of the DSCC's Women's Senate Network is so critical.
Thanks for being part of history,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_

Team --
We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle. That's nearly half of all women in the Senate.
Elizabeth Warren is up in Massachusetts. Without her, we wouldn't have the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an agency that holds Wall Street and corporate billionaires accountable.
Claire McCaskill is up in Missouri. Without her, we wouldn't have one of our top supporters of reforms that would extend the Social Security and Medicare promise to future generations.
Tammy Baldwin is up in Wisconsin. Without her, we wouldn't have our first openly LGBTQ Senator and powerful advocate to let children stay on their parents' health insurance until age 26.
When the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee announced the Women's Senate Network to make sure that these women and more stay in the Senate, we knew this community would be all in.
[**Today, we 're asking you to join all of us on Team Maggie and become a 2018 founding donor of the Women's Senate Network. Please, give $3 or more to help us build a community to support Democratic women like Elizabeth, Tammy, and Claire who run for office.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec5/2a380d31/190e411e/fe43ed/1634114048/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcyNV9XU04xa2lja19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20170725_WSN1kick_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We won't mince words: 2018 is going to be a tough year for Democrats. But we also know that Democratic women are some of the most persistent, resilient leaders we have.
That's why the DSCC's Women's Senate Network is ramping up its 2018 efforts to elect smart, tough, and experienced candidates to fight for what's right -- who understand that women are not pre-existing conditions, that we deserve equal pay, and we absolutely need Planned Parenthood and affordable health care for hardworking families.
[**If this sounds like a fight you want to be a part of (and you should!), make a gift of $3 or more to get in on the ground floor and become a founding donor of the Women 's Senate Network.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec5/2a380d31/190e411e/fe43ed/1634114048/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN193c24iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcyNV9XU04xa2lja19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_wsn?refcode=e20170725_WSN1kick_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for being part of this. Women across the country thank you too.
-- Team Maggie

name: Tom Perez
subject: BREAKING: Senate Republicans just voted to repeal
body:
Help us save affordable care.
---
**Senate Republicans just voted to repeal our health care -- so we're going to vote them out of office. Help us raise $100,000 to elect Democrats today, and get your donation matched.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405231a8/4067b0a/3117973c3/7e6d0f7f/241853637/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-Match-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170725_tp2_nd&source=em_20170725_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170725_tp2_nd")**
**
Derek, the nightmare just became real: Senate Republicans voted to move forward with health care repeal. It's only a matter of time before a repeal bill lands on Donald Trump's desk and he eagerly signs it into law.

I'm devastated. Millions of Americans will lose their coverage, millions more will face skyrocketing premiums that put the care they need out of reach, babies born with chronic illnesses could hit lifetime caps on coverage before their first birthday -- this is not who we are.

**[So here's what we have to do now, Derek: pick ourselves up and get back to work so we can kick every single Republican who votes to take our health care away out of office.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405231a8/4067b0a/3117973c3/7e6d0f7c/241853637/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-Match-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+heres+what+we+have+to+do+nowCUSTOMDAT&utm_campaign=em_20170725_tp2_nd&source=em_20170725_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170725_tp2_nd")**

We want to raise $100,000 before the end of the day to start laying the groundwork to win back the House and Senate, and a group of generous Democrats has offered to match it dollar-for-dollar. Chip in $3 or more right now to help us get there and get your donation matched.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: R. Jai Gillum
subject: Our birthday present to Andrew
body:
#
Team --
If you saw my email last week, you know that I'm working on a big surprise for Andrew's birthday on Wednesday. If you didn't see it, here's the basic idea:
We want to give Andrew a day off from the campaign trail to spend time with our kids. But in order to do that, we need to get at least 500 online donors by tomorrow. [**So we made this special fundraising page and hid it from Andrew 's account, in hopes of surprising him with a day off.**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cf/9e00690/4c3447d7/240362a7/4185877605/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170725-kids")
If enough of us are willing to chip in to make this birthday present possible, you will bring some big smiles to three children who think they have the best dad in the world.
[](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cf/9e00690/4c3447d7/240362a7/4185877605/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170725-kids")
**[Help us give Andrew a day off to spend with our family by chipping in to our special birthday fundraising page>> ](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cf/9e00690/4c3447d7/240362a7/4185877605/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170725-kids")**
Together, we can give Andrew the best birthday present ever. Thank you for all of your help!
Bring it home,
R. Jai Gillum
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32cf/9e00690/4c3447d7/240362a7/4185877605/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-birthday?refcode=em20170725-kids")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

Thanks for your input,
FlaDems.com

name: rapid-response@maggiehassan.com
subject: need you in this fight (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec2/2a380d31/1ef90ac3/fe400d/1803765075/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec2/2a380d31/1ef90ac3/fe400d/1803765075/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
This is despicable --
Just when we thought that the Republicans' health care plan had been squashed, Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell recklessly pushed it forward in the Senate.
Thanks to McConnell's secretive, backhanded maneuver, the GOP is one step closer to dismantling Obamacare, defunding Planned Parenthood, and ripping health coverage away from millions of people.
There is still time to make your voice heard in this fight, but the clock is ticking:
[**Add your name to denounce the Republicans' reckless decision to roll back health care protections for millions of hard-working families.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec2/2a380d31/1ef90ac3/fe400e/1803765075/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170725_HealthVote?source=e20170725_healthvote_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
The Republicans' plan could end Medicaid as we know it, defund Planned Parenthood, and drive up costs for those who need care the most.
That's why Democrats in the Senate are united in their resolve to protect affordable health care. But it's not enough -- we need you in this fight too.
[**Please, put your name down to say that you want to improve on our health care system, not leave our friends, families, and neighbors without the coverage they need to get and stay healthy.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdec2/2a380d31/1ef90ac3/fe400e/1803765075/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170725_HealthVote?source=e20170725_healthvote_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d50/2fde7c66/45135065/15696d99/497768878/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/offshore-drilling?utm_campaign=em17_170725_offshore_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170725_offshore_adv_gq_ful__RC&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Friends,

Last week, I announced my opposition to offshore drilling and seismic testing in North Carolina.

Like so many other North Carolinians, I have wonderful memories of visiting our beautiful beaches. For years, our coast has welcomed visitors looking to enjoy swimming, walking, and fishing. And it has brought prosperity to our state with a booming tourism economy.

Our coast is part of our identity, friend. We have over 300 miles of coastline and 22 barrier islands.

**Allowing drilling and gas exploration would bring unacceptable risks to our economy, our environment, and our coastal communities--and for little potential gain.**

**[I can sum it up in four words: Not off our coast. Add your name here if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d50/2fde7c66/45135065/15696d98/497768878/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/offshore-drilling?utm_campaign=em17_170725_offshore_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170725_offshore_adv_gq_ful__RC&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+I+can+sum+it+up+in+four+words+Not+off+ou")**

As of now, more than 30 coastal communities in North Carolina have passed resolutions opposing offshore drilling -- joining nearly 200 businesses and community groups that have stepped up against it.

At a time when Republicans and Democrats agree on almost nothing, a bipartisan mix of our state's congressional delegation have voiced their opposition as well.

This is an effort that I'm proud to lead.

**[Add your name today if you're against offshore drilling in North Carolina.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d50/2fde7c66/45135065/15696d9b/497768878/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/offshore-drilling?utm_campaign=em17_170725_offshore_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170725_offshore_adv_gq_ful__RC&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+today+if+youre+against+off")**

Thanks for all you do,

Roy

subject: Deciding Vote Dean
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64c4/24c69fd9/c26692e7/1899a96b/2712956277/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact&source=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact")
---

Peter,

Senate Republicans JUST voted to advance Trumpcare by the margin of **_a single vote_**.

The deciding vote was Nevada Senator Dean Heller -- the most vulnerable Republican in the Senate, and we are going to make sure he loses his seat because of it.

We've already endorsed Jacky Rosen to take on and defeat Heller. Now we have to make sure she has the resources to win.

**[Donate $3 to Jacky right now to help her defeat Dean Heller-- the first of many Republicans we will make sure lose their seats because of this vote. 100% of your donation will go directly to Jacky's campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64c4/24c69fd9/c26692e7/1899a964/2712956277/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/jacky-rosen1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+Jacky+right+now+to+help+her+&utm_campaign=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact&source=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64c4/24c69fd9/c26692e7/1899a965/2712956277/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/jacky-rosen1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact&source=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact")
Heller waffled for weeks on this vote, but ultimately he sided with Trump over the thousands of Nevada families and tens of millions of Americans who could lose their insurance because of this legislation.

As if losing their health insurance wasn't bad enough news for women and families in Nevada, the bill ALSO defunds Planned Parenthood. It is the worst bill for women in a generation.

**Heller deserves to lose his seat for this political cowardice. Donate $3 to help Jacky defeat him -- 100% of your donation will go to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defeat-Dean-Heller](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64c4/24c69fd9/c26692e7/1899a966/2712956277/VEsC/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/jacky-rosen1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefeatDeanHeller&utm_campaign=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact&source=WQEFC735N_digital_email_20170725_HellerTcare_inact")**

Thanks,

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List
